label: https://trailhead.salesforce.com/content/learn/modules/apex_database
intent: Prioritize hands-on developer work: Apex, SOQL, DML, and coding. Exclude quizzes, certification exams, knowledge checks, and trivia.

units.title: Get Started with Apex
units.reason: This unit provides the foundational introduction to Apex, essential for all subsequent hands-on developer work.

units.title: Use sObjects
units.reason: Understanding sObjects is crucial for hands-on Apex development, enabling interaction with Salesforce data before DML or SOQL.

units.title: Manipulate Records with DML
units.reason: Directly addresses the intent's focus on DML, providing practical skills for creating, updating, and deleting records in Apex.

units.title: Write SOQL Queries
units.reason: This unit is central to the intent's request for SOQL, teaching hands-on data retrieval techniques in Apex.

units.title: Write SOSL Queries
units.reason: Expands on query capabilities, offering hands-on experience with SOSL for text-based searches, complementing SOQL for comprehensive data access.
